Your Launch Goals
Module 2
Setting goals…	Setting goals…	Setting goals…	Setting goals…
• If you don’t know where you’re going, any road
will get there you there.
• You can’t create a great strategy until you figure
out where you want to go.
Setting goals…	Setting goals…	Setting goals…	Setting goals…
• What do you want to get out of your Launch?
• What is a home run for you?
• You can have primary and secondary goals…
• Your goals will impact your launch strategy

Launch goals…	Launch goals…	Launch goals…	Launch goals…
• Money
• What most people assume a launch is about,
but that’s not always the case
• But if it is about money (and I’ve done many
launches that were about the money) - then
own it
• Tax sale launch to pay a tax bill
• Launched to buy a house
Launch goals…	Launch goals…	Launch goals…	Launch goals…
• “Save the World”
• Lots of PLF launches fall into this category
• This doesn’t preclude making money…
• It’s a lot easier to save the world if you can
FUND your mission
More launch goals…	More launch goals…	More launch goals…	More launch goals…
• Build proof and social proof
• Attract Joint Venture partners and affiliates (build
a conversion machine)
• Create products (Seed Launch)
• Build your list (client list or prospect list or both)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

More launch goals…	More launch goals…	More launch goals…	More launch goals…
• Gather data - get crazy market data, figure out
the best squeeze pages, headlines, offer, etc.
• Let comments people leave help with your offer
and copy
• Lots of other reasons…
More launch goals…	More launch goals…	More launch goals…	More launch goals…
• If you're looking to influence people, PLF is the
best way to do it
• FuzzyYellowBalls.com
• Deal with two top-tier tennis pros
• He wanted that launch to be a homerun for
those two players
• Which would give him positioning and
influence to get more top tennis pro clients
More launch goals…	More launch goals…	More launch goals…	More launch goals…
• You can also use PLF to get in the door…
• Selling a CRM (Customer Relationship Package)
to Fortune 500 Companies
• Big decisions involving big committees
• Used PLF to get in the door and make a
presentation
• The end goal was to get the appointment
